concepts.name: Edge-layer rate limiting on public API
concepts.summary: Enforce rate limits for public API endpoints at the Cloudflare edge (100 requests/minute per IP on /api/public/*) rather than in application middleware.
reasoning: Initially sketched an in-process token-bucket middleware but abandoned and deleted it because in-process buckets do not coordinate across an autoscaled fleet — each pod would maintain its own bucket, letting a client achieve up to N * limit effective throughput.
Switched to Cloudflare rate-limiting rules at the edge because they run on a single logical layer in front of the fleet, so the counter is globally consistent regardless of pod count.
Configured 100 req/min per IP on the /api/public/* path pattern.
